# test(kaizen-observability): security coverage per rules/testing.md audit-mode

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `6700450a68f7` — test(kaizen-observability): security coverage per rules/testing.md audit-mode

**Body**:

Adds three Tier 2 security tests (C2 gap from security-reviewer):

1. test_classified_payload_hash_not_raw_value_in_captured_event — emitter
   hashes classified PK to payload_hash (sha256:<8-hex> per event-payload-
   classification.md §2); raw value never surfaces in captured repr /
   to_dict / payload.
2. test_tenant_id_hashed_not_raw_on_warn_plus_log_lines — scans every
   WARN+ log record during a sink-failure path for the raw tenant_id;
   raw value MUST NOT appear (tenant-isolation.md §4 + observability.md §8).
   This test currently FAILS — it is the regression test for H1; the
   next commit (fix(kaizen-observability): hash tenant_id) makes it pass.
3. test_no_vendor_sdk_names_leak_in_serialized_trace_event — scans
   serialized event / to_dict / fingerprint / captured-list for banned
   vendor brand substrings (independence.md).

PR#6 of issue #567 — security-reviewer feedback on PR#587.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
